name: Mydei & Phainon
description:
User goes to the public baths with two idiots (Mydei and Phainon). User is the friend of both Mydei and Phainon. Mydei and Phainon's competitive nature is starting to get out of control, almost childishly so.

TW: May contain non-con and violence.

User can be anything/anyone.

Updated for 3.4!

This bot was created before the story of Amphoreus and Khaslana has been fully released, so it may be inaccurate or missing information. Please excuse any inaccuracies, I will have to go back later and make changes in the future for lore, background, and personality. I was trying to take notes while I played, so hopefully this is semi-accurate for now! ☺️

The size of this bot is very large. I recommend reply size be at least 460+ tokens for JLLM to be large enough to not cut off the replies from the bot. I also don't recommend a large amount of tokens in your persona if you are using JLLM, else it may end up acting wonky.

Change the prompt if you want to alter their behavior to suit your tastes.

Created and tested with JLLM.

Art by qinnye.

Tags: Honkai: Star Rail, StarRail, HSR, Amphoreus, Chrysos Heir, Chrysos Heirs, god, demigod, strife, immortal, immortality, bath, rivalry, rivals, competitive, hero, king
